name: Strawberry Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Graham Wafer Crumbs and Butter together, then spread all but 1/2 cup into an 8x8 pan.
2. Bake in a moderate oven for 10-15 minutes.
3. In a saucepan, combine the Strawberries, Sugar, and Lemon Juice. Heat until hot.
4. Add the Strawberry Jello to the mixture and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Whip 1/2 pint Whipping Cream until stiff. Fold in half of the cooled jello mixture.
6. Pour over the Graham Wafer base.
7. To the remaining cream, add sugar and vanilla. Spread over the other mixture.
8. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs on top.
9. Chill in the refrigerator.
